revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-280

Tapper (U.S.A.)

A heavy pendulum suspended outside a bell which sets the bell in vibration by striking it.


Note: A tapper is a form of hammer (3-2-285).


{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Tapper}}
